title: Which risk is this debt fund taking?
intro: Every debt fund sits on two axes — duration and credit. Sort each into its dominant risk.

cards.text: Credit-risk fund holding AA/A paper for extra yield
Fund concentrated in a few lower-rated corporate bonds

debrief: Gilt/long-duration funds have near-zero credit risk but big duration swings. Credit-risk funds chase yield by lending to weaker borrowers. Liquid/overnight funds minimise both — the right home for your emergency buffer. Category name hints at duration; the factsheet reveals credit.
